issue_summary: Remove GrahamScan, GiftWrap, make MonotoneChain more robust wrt collinear points, add ConvergenceException in case the specified tolerance results in a non-convex hull.
code_before:
ConvexHull generate(Collection

points) throws NullArgumentException;
code_after:
ConvexHull generate(Collection

points) throws NullArgumentException, ConvergenceException;
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Builds the convex hull from the set of input points.
     *
     * @param points the set of input points
     * @return the convex hull
     * @throws NullArgumentException if the input collection is {@code null}
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Builds the convex hull from the set of input points.
     *
     * @param points the set of input points
     * @return the convex hull
     * @throws NullArgumentException if the input collection is {@code null}
     * @throws ConvergenceException if generator fails to generate a convex hull for
     * the given set of input points
     */
